description: Evals for the deployment-planner skill — covers Dockerfile generation, CI/CD workflow creation, and deployment checklists.

evals.name: generate-dockerfile
evals.prompt: Write a Dockerfile for the DZIRE_v1 backend FastAPI app.
evals.expected_output: A valid Dockerfile using python:3.11-slim base image, copying requirements.txt and installing deps, running as a non-root user, exposing port 8000, and starting with uvicorn. Includes a HEALTHCHECK instruction.

evals.name: generate-github-actions-workflow
evals.prompt: Create a GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow that runs tests and deploys the app on push to main.
evals.expected_output: A valid .github/workflows/deploy.yml with jobs for test (pytest + vitest) and deploy. Uses matrix strategy for test steps, and includes Vercel and Render deployment steps. Secrets referenced via ${{ secrets.* }}.

evals.name: deployment-checklist
evals.prompt: Generate a deployment checklist for going to production for the first time.
evals.expected_output: A markdown checklist with at least 8 items covering: env vars set in provider dashboards, Docker build passes, DB migrations run, test suite passes, frontend builds, preview URL tested, domains configured, and deployment documented.

evals.name: render-service-config
evals.prompt: What Render settings should I use to deploy the FastAPI backend?
evals.expected_output: Configuration guidance for Render: Environment=Docker, Branch=main, Port=8000, Health check path=/health, with notes on environment variable setup and the deploy trigger.
